feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: ix-memory
entry.content: Ix Memory integration — transforms Claude into a graph-reasoning agent with cognitive skills for understanding, investigation, impact analysis, planning, debugging, architecture auditing, and deep documentation synthesis.

entry.title: antigravity
entry.content: Run the Antigravity CLI (Gemini) as a collaborating AI inside Claude Code, with intelligent model routing across the SDLC. Claude conducts — requirements, architecture, the hard 20%, verification, review — and routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, tests, first-pass review, migrations, web/Vertex AI Search) to Antigravity. Hybrid agentic engineering; lower token cost as a financial lever.

entry.title: track
entry.content: Record-only spec / realization / acceptance system of record. Bundles the read-only track-mcp server (report / query / validate / branch-provenance / freshness) over a project's .track/ event log. Writes stay on the `track` CLI (record-only, append-only, integrity-chained).

entry.title: agentdeals
entry.content: Search and compare free tiers, credits, and pricing changes across 1,500+ developer tools. Find deals for databases, hosting, CI/CD, monitoring, and 50+ categories.

entry.title: memory-mirror
entry.content: Cross-platform AI memory by Mollow. Remembers decisions, preferences, and work patterns across Claude Code, Claude.ai, ChatGPT, and every AI you use.

entry.title: ltspice-mcp
entry.content: LTspice/ngspice circuit simulation with structured results — including per-device operating points (gm/gds/vth) read back by name, no rawfile parsing — plus LTspice .asc schematic editing, exposed as MCP tools. Tracks the latest ltspice-mcp release on PyPI.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: marketing-offers-tool
entry.content: SvelteKit tool for marketing teams to manage aggregator offers (Wolt, Bolt) and track offer performance.

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Ships 23 skills: skill-advisor, advise, learn, myrmidon-swarm, brainstorm, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification, git-worktrees, finish-branch, code-review, repo-analyze, repo-analyze-quick, repo-analyze-strict, repo-analyze-full, repo-analyze-quick-full, repo-analyze-strict-full, review-pr-strict, worktree-cleanup, tidy, create-reusable-utilities, github-actions-python-cicd, and python-repo-modernization.

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: crucible-suite
entry.content: Complete writing system for epic fantasy novels using the Crucible Structureâ€”a 36-beat narrative framework with three interwoven story strands. Includes planning, outlining, prose writing with bi-chapter reviews, and editing.

entry.title: leerie
entry.content: Deterministic, headless task orchestrator for Claude Code. Classifies a task, decomposes it into granular subtasks, schedules them into dependency-ordered waves, and executes each in an isolated git worktree under an evidence-gated implement/validate loop. Runs entirely on the Claude Code CLI/subscription via `claude -p` workers.

entry.title: patterns
entry.content: Workflow pattern manager for Claude Code — lists, instantiates, and patches workflow patterns. Ships /patterns command + agent-monitoring template.

entry.title: shipflow
entry.content: ShipFlow for Claude Code: dedicated /shipflow-* commands (loop, status, issues, PRs, releases) plus a natural-language skill. Bundles the renaiss-shipflow CLI (no separate install) and self-updates on use.

entry.title: steep
entry.content: Connect Claude to your Steep workspace — query metrics, targets, entities, and team data via the Model Context Protocol.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: zegging-skills
entry.content: zegging's skills marketplace — a curated collection of Claude skills for code review, architecture analysis, and engineering best practices

entry.title: seldonframe
entry.content: SeldonFrame Business OS — one command creates a real hosted workspace on *.app.seldonframe.com with CRM, Cal.diy booking, Formbricks intake, and Brain v2. No key, no signup, no setup. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY only to unlock Pro capabilities (second workspace, custom domains, full Brain v2).

entry.title: timbroddin-skills
entry.content: timbroddin-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: awesome-skills
entry.content: Community collection of Apify agent skills for web scraping, data extraction, and automation

entry.title: agent-orchestra
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow system for Claude Code. Pipeline-based agent orchestration: Issue → Design → Plan → Implement → Review → PR.

entry.title: claude-statusbar
entry.content: Lightweight Claude Code status-line monitor with switchable styles, themes, and slash commands. v3.15.1 fixes a background `git status` that could strand `.git/index.lock` and block your own commits, makes `cs config set warning_threshold`/`critical_threshold` actually drive the bar (they were silently ignored), and aligns the context-window colour across quota/no-quota modes (model name now uses the 70/85 context band, so ~35% context reads calm green instead of a false yellow); per-session no-quota detection under the shared daemon was also fixed. v3.14.1 lowers the projection red line to 85% (yellow now 70–84) so a 7d window heading for →99% reads red instead of merely warm. v3.14.0 colours the 5h/7d bars by where usage is HEADED, not where it is now: once an end-of-window projection exists, the bar fill, label, and reset clock take their severity from the projected % against the cap (green <80, yellow 80–99, red ≥100) while the fill length still shows current usage — so a 7d window at 24% but on track for →96% reads yellow instead of a falsely-healthy green (all three styles). It also fixes the →NN% projection reading far too low for the first ~15 min after a reset (it was seeded from the used=0 first tick and lagged); it now holds `→--` until MIN_ELAPSED, then seeds from the first trustworthy reading. v3.13.3–v3.13.5 fix the 5h/7d bars sticking at a stale high % after Anthropic re-baselines usage mid-window (e.g. weekly limit raised): the cross-session merge now accepts an official downward revision once the old reading goes unconfirmed for 120s, idle windows replaying hours-old rate_limits blobs (expired 5h reset) can no longer overwrite or re-confirm the shared reading, and the →NN% projection drops its old-denominator samples and relearns after a re-baseline instead of freezing for the rest of the window. v3.13.0 adds a ⚙ session-mode line — effort (low/medium/high/xhigh/max/ultracode/auto) · thinking · fast · output-style — with a distinct static colour gradient per effort tier. v3.12.0 adds an always-on end-of-window projection (→NN%, learned from your local work rhythm) + an at-risk `⚠eta` forecast after each reset timer, session lines on by default, and a faint on-bar version that shows a `↑` hint when a newer release is on PyPI. v3.10.0 adds an opt-in live-activity line (in-progress todo, active tool, completed-tool rollup), git ahead/behind + session duration/lines on the project line, running-subagent lines, an opt-in `bar_shimmer` starfield on the battery bars, and a self-hosted plugin marketplace — plus a reliability fix so auto-update actually runs in daemon mode (detached, non-blocking) and the cache countdown is now per-session-correct. v3.9.0 makes the `cache` countdown auto-detect the real prompt-cache TTL (5m vs 1h) from the transcript, fixing a ~55-minute early `cache COLD` for Claude subscription users (Claude Code requests the 1-hour TTL automatically). v3.7.0 defends against status-line hijacking: a new `cs --setup --project [PATH]` writes a project-level override so another tool stealing the global `~/.claude/settings.json` slot can't kick `cs` out of this project; when displacement is detected, the bar also surfaces a one-line warning. v3.6.0 makes daemon (fast) mode the default for `cs --setup` — under 1% CPU continuously instead of ~3% inline at refreshInterval=1; pass `--inline` to opt back. Requires the `cs` CLI from PyPI (`pip install claude-statusbar` or `uv tool install claude-statusbar`).

entry.title: better-godot-mcp
entry.content: Comprehensive Godot Engine integration — 17 tools for game development

entry.title: larch
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entry.title: duke-strategies
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Duke Strategies branded deliverables

entry.title: sidekick
entry.content: Sidekick — AI coding-agent delegation workflows for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. Kay and Codex are the supported sidekicks: Kay installs through Sidekick, while Codex delegates to the local OpenAI Codex CLI. The Claude-facing workflow bodies are generated from skills into agents/claude.

entry.title: mcp-media-ingestor
entry.content: Enables Claude to internally view local JPEG/PNG images and extract timeline keyframes from video files. Internal context only — never renders media back to the user.

entry.title: sentio-ai-kit
entry.content: Skills for working with the Sentio platform — building blockchain data processors, running SQL queries, managing alerts, dashboards, and endpoints

entry.title: ella-core
entry.content: Manage and inspect a running Ella Core 5G private mobile network via its REST API.

entry.title: drawio-code-skill
entry.content: Generate polished .drawio diagrams with auto-layout, 10k+ shapes, AI brand logos, and export to PNG/SVG/PDF. Use for architecture diagrams, UML, ERD, flowcharts, ML model figures, and more.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: claude-tg — drive Claude Code from Telegram. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: eds-content-ops
entry.content: Content operations skills for AEM Edge Delivery Services: page auditing, GEO optimization, accessibility remediation, bulk metadata management, and content diffing. The first third-party content-ops skills for the EDS ecosystem.

entry.title: sdlc-agents
entry.content: SDLC workflow agents and skills for Plane Conductor — BABOK, C4, DDD, ISTQB, OWASP, WCAG-grounded.

entry.title: kaizen
entry.content: Continuous improvement plugin for Claude Code — enforcement hooks, reflection workflows, dev workflow skills, and recursive self-improvement

entry.title: hermes-warehouse
entry.content: Query the Hermes data warehouse (Amazon Redshift) through governed, access-scoped, read-only SQL, and search the knowledge base attached to each schema for metric definitions. Bundles the warehouse-analytics skill that takes a plain-language question all the way to validated results or a dashboard — looking up what each metric means via search_knowledge_base before it computes — plus the connection to the hermes-warehouse MCP server.

entry.title: autumn
entry.content: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entry.title: build-loop
entry.content: Multi-phase build orchestration with native debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Native debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills provide root-cause investigation without a bundled MCP server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; logging-tracer-bridge is an optional escalation hop to the standalone Coding Debugger supporting plugin for extended capability.

entry.title: develop
entry.content: a plugin to automate common development tasks

entry.title: phased-dev
entry.content: Agent-driven phased development workflow built on a scope abstraction. Each scope declares its own pipeline; every pipeline opens with a research phase (prior art, feasibility, domain constraints) feeding the phases that follow. Shipped pipelines cover standard projects (research → brainstorm → engineering → plan → implement), design-heavy projects (research → brainstorm → ux → engineering → plan → implement, with full design language / component inventory / a11y contract), standard features (research → engineering → plan → implement), and design-heavy features (research → ux → engineering → plan → implement, for UX-led features like onboarding rewrites or editor modes). Bundles 10 unified slash commands (including rewind-phase and generate-ux-preview), role-separated subagents, per-task completion markers, per-feature status mirrors, and templates with phase gates and per-task execution logs.

entry.title: forge
entry.content: Unified AI coding workflow framework - single /forge slash command with 38 internal subcommands, TDD, spec-driven planning, and automated review.

entry.title: energy-star-pm
entry.content: EPA ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager — retrieve scores, EUI benchmarks, carbon estimates. Share your properties with api@soapbox.build to connect.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Shihyu's curated collection of agent skills — install once, get them all

entry.title: task-management
entry.content: Markdown-based task management with daily/weekly views, inbox processing, Google Calendar integration, meeting transcription, and idea tracking.

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — session management, memory recall/save, and setup tools

entry.title: dash0-agent-plugin
entry.content: OpenTelemetry observability for Claude Code sessions. Captures tool calls, LLM invocations, token usage, and errors as OTel traces.

entry.title: arc-1
entry.content: SAP ABAP development for Claude Code: bundles the ARC-1 MCP server (read/write/search/activate/lint/diagnose ABAP via the ADT REST API) with best-practice skills for RAP services, CDS modelling, ABAP Unit tests, clean-core audits, and UI5 modernization. Read-only by default; opt-in write gates.

entry.title: maos
entry.content: MAOS (Multi-Agent OS) - Coordination Framework for AI Agents with Orchestration, Sentinel Protocol, Worktree Governance, Status Maps, Forge Meta-Agent, Governance Protocols

entry.title: quant-skills
entry.content: 金融量化框架与投研

entry.title: SoulMap Voice System
entry.content: Persona, response calibration, and session ritual guidance for keeping SoulMap's tone consistent across interactions.

entry.title: use-case-skills
entry.content: Convenience bundle — every vertical (linkedin-leads, facebook-leads, amazon-research). Needs the reduck base plugin. (Also the "Use Case Skills" group in the skills CLI picker.)

entry.title: shenbi
entry.content: AI skill framework for novel writing

entry.title: ai-config
entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: trtc-agent-skills
entry.content: TRTC AI Integration Assistant - helps developers integrate Tencent Real-Time Communication SDKs (Chat, Call, RTC Engine, Live, Conference) across Web, Android, iOS, Flutter, and Electron.

entry.title: prism
entry.content: Whole-repo code navigation (the prism-mcp server) plus defect-focused diff slicing, packaged for coding agents. Pre-wires the prism MCP server to the current project and ships two Agent Skills (prism-code-navigation, prism-code-slicing) that teach an agent when and how to use them.

entry.title: topia
entry.content: 71-skill Topia Nexus for Claude Code — discipline rails via native hooks (readiness/guardian/completion-gate/quarantine). 315 synapses + 49 pulses, Maestro routing, optional agora-code neural memory. Use topia:build for code, topia:architecture-mapper for legacy mapping, topia:team for parallel work, topia:launch for deploy, topia:rescue for legacy code.

entry.title: affiliate-networks-mcp
entry.content: Chat with your affiliate-network data in Claude through a local MCP server. 80+ publisher and advertiser-side adapters across the US, EU, Nordics, APAC and LatAm, most experimental.

entry.title: autonomous-fleet
entry.content: Portable multi-agent engineering framework for fully-autonomous coding runs across orchestration tools. A tool-agnostic core engine, per-runtime adapters (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Orca), and 3 shipped mission skills (doc-sync, test-coverage, adversarial-review-and-fix) that compose into multi-step engineering campaigns; 18 more missions ship as exploratory docs pending real-run promotion.

entry.title: portfolio
entry.content: Grounded portfolio/resume/reference/fit/rating from a developer's real GitHub work — every claim traced to evidence, never invented.

entry.title: zensu
entry.content: Product Lifecycle Manager — Features as First-Class Citizens

entry.title: hookstack
entry.content: Production-ready hooks for Claude Code — security, quality, context, and notifications in one install.

entry.title: cidd
entry.content: 오라클 가용성에 따라 단계마다(explore·plan·build·review) 모양이 다른 멀티에이전트 개발 플러그인. explore=발산 생성+judge, plan=lens 마찰, build=gen-verify-repair, review=하드 오라클+lens advisory(게이트 아님).

entry.title: intent-mail
entry.content: Self-hosted email triage for Claude Code over Gmail and Outlook. Daily check-in digest (P1–P4 priority + why + needs-response), long-thread summaries, group-by-category, and real actions (read/archive/delete/draft/flag/move) through Gmail and Microsoft Graph — you hold the OAuth token, no third party sees your mailbox.

entry.title: ilo
entry.content: Run builds, tests, and tooling inside reproducible containerized dev environments with the ilo CLI (shell, compose, devcontainer, devfile).

entry.title: chronicle
entry.content: A growing collection of skills for organizing your personal records — TIL notes, reflections, and more.

entry.title: dqe-quality
entry.content: Data quality suite for Claude Code by DQE Software. Audit CSV files across 6 DQE dimensions, run end-to-end campaign data quality workflows (email/phone validation + deduplication via DQE One Server MCP), and manage DQE processes directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: growmax-skills
entry.content: Growmax team Claude Code skills and workflows. Auto-discovers skills/, commands/, agents/, and hooks/. Ships: github-repo-analyzer (skill) and e2e-flow (gated multi-agent E2E test-generation workflow for web + api surfaces).

entry.title: baker-street-skills
entry.content: baker-street-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: pixel-sprite-generator
entry.content: Generate pixel-art sprites via local image-model-first generation with deterministic JSON-grid fallback. Configured via pixel-sprite.config.yaml.

entry.title: open-kioku
entry.content: Local-first code intelligence for AI agents — instant code search, symbol resolution, impact analysis, dependency graphs, and context packs across any codebase. Works offline. No data leaves your machine.

entry.title: pandasuite
entry.content: Explore and understand PandaSuite Studio projects from Claude Code — screens, units, structure, and state.

entry.title: tmb
entry.content: TMB plugin — bro orchestrates swe + pr-reviewer across a task-close and a push gate, backed by an MCP server: a SQLite trajectory log plus a kuzu world model that helps agents understand and navigate complex codebases.

entry.title: nl-ez-plugin
entry.content: Branded Claude Code plugin for Ministerie van Economische Zaken en Klimaat (nl-ez). Composes Dutch government data intelligence (nl-gov-data MCP — Tweede Kamer, Rijksoverheid, KOOP, BWB, Wetgevingskalender, Rechtspraak, CBS, plus nl-issue-framing, nl-parliamentary-positioning, nl-policy-legislative-landscape, nl-tensions) with server-side branded document formatting (stromy-format) and markdown-canvas deliverable planning, over the nl-ez client-data brand overlay.

entry.title: factiq
entry.content: Answer economic and financial data questions with real data from FactIQ — publish shareable charts and reports, or build bespoke local HTML visualizations.

entry.title: jira
entry.content: Comprehensive Jira integration with auto-detection of issue keys

entry.title: amaris-consulting
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Amaris Consulting branded deliverables, brand tools, and strategic deliverable planning

entry.title: gmgn-cli
entry.content: GMGN OpenAPI skills — token info, market data, wallet portfolio, and swap

entry.title: triflux
entry.content: CLI-first multi-model orchestrator for Claude Code — route tasks to Codex, Antigravity, and Claude

entry.title: webex
entry.content: Webex workspace integration for Claude Code. Read messages, send replies, monitor spaces in real-time, route inbound messages to agents, and send rich Adaptive Cards. Surpasses basic chat plugins with priority inbox, watchdogs, cross-space intelligence, and automated workflows.

entry.title: cartog
entry.content: Code graph navigation and semantic search for LLM coding agents

entry.title: netlify-skills
entry.content: Netlify platform skills for Claude Code

entry.title: problem-based-srs
entry.content: Problem-Based Software Requirements Specification methodology for AI-assisted requirements engineering. Provides structured approach to capture Customer Problems (WHY), Customer Needs (WHAT), and Functional Requirements (HOW) with full traceability.

entry.title: super-pm
entry.content: Product Manager Skills Pack - 39 skills across 5 modules: demand insight, solution design, growth iteration, risk management, and product strategy

entry.title: conoha-vps-mcp
entry.content: ConoHa VPS MCPサーバーの操作をガイドするClaude Codeプラグイン。サーバー管理、ボリューム、セキュリティグループ、オブジェクトストレージの操作ワークフロー・制約・スキーマを提供する。

entry.title: superpipelines
entry.content: Design, generate, and run multi-agent AI pipelines — scope-aware, multi-pipeline, spec-driven, write/review-isolated, with step-level create/update/delete and integrated audit

entry.title: qdrant
entry.content: Agent skills for Qdrant vector search: scaling, performance optimization, search quality, monitoring, deployment, model migration, version upgrades, and SDK usage

entry.title: roadmapsmith
entry.content: Evidence-backed ROADMAP.md workflows for AI coding agents, with canonical RoadmapSmith status and maintain surfaces plus advanced sync/generate tools and legacy compatibility aliases.

entry.title: ceo
entry.content: Autonomous CEO agent for Claude Code. Reads your Obsidian vault, prioritizes work, dispatches 6 specialized subagents, and learns from corrections via playbooks and training files.

entry.title: pulp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Pulp audio framework — build, test, design, and ship audio plugins and apps

entry.title: clickhouse-monitor
entry.content: Specialized assistance for the chmonitor dashboard - a real-time monitoring dashboard for ClickHouse clusters

entry.title: faf
entry.content: Persistent Project Context for AI — IANA-registered .faf format. Run /faf to score your project in Claude Code; install the CLI via `bunx faf` or `npm install -g faf-cli` for the full toolkit.

entry.title: visualcave
entry.content: Generate interactive technical diagrams as standalone HTML files. Powered by Mermaid.js. Supports flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ER diagrams, class diagrams, state machines, timelines, mind maps, git graphs, pie charts, and quadrant charts. Dark mode, step-through reveal, and export built in.

entry.title: claudeclaw2
entry.content: Multi-channel bridge for Claude Code: per-channel tmux-hosted agents driven by Telegram / Discord / Slack / LINE

entry.title: langsmith-cli
entry.content: A context-efficient interface for LangSmith observability and evaluations.

entry.title: imagine-mcp
entry.content: Image/video understanding & generation across Gemini, OpenAI, Grok

entry.title: adjutant-agent
entry.content: Adjutant agent protocol for MCP communication, beads, and epic planning

entry.title: agile-skills + 9arm-skills
entry.content: agile-skills + 9arm-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: issuesdb-plugin
entry.content: Skills for grooming and working issuesdb issues end-to-end — from triage through PR

entry.title: claudelint
entry.content: A comprehensive linter for Claude Code projects. Validates CLAUDE.md files, skills, settings, hooks, MCP servers, plugins, and more. Requires: npm install --save-dev claude-code-lint

entry.title: temper
entry.content: Temper: Quality gates, blast radius analysis, and intent-driven development for AI-generated code

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry Plugin for Claude Code to help with debugging including MCP, commands, and skill capabilities.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Collection of mittwald skills for the Claude plugin system.

entry.title: soapbox-report
entry.content: Centralized consulting-grade reporting for Soapbox — paginated HTML artifacts with Paged.js for interactive review, exported to PDF via Playwright, .pptx, and .xlsx. Called by all other Soapbox plugins. Replaces audette-plugins/skills/report.

entry.title: automate
entry.content: Connect to Kobiton mobile testing platform - manage devices, run automation suites, and view test results

entry.title: mintlify-docs
entry.content: House-style toolkit for Mintlify docs sites. Scaffold an IA, review pages against a content playbook, write reader-facing changelogs, and generate drift-checked CLI/MCP/API references. Layers on the official mintlify plugin for component and docs.json mechanics.

entry.title: jaas
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: anchored
entry.content: Persistent cross-tool memory for AI coding agents. Single binary, zero dependencies, local-first. Shared between every IDE and AI tool you use.

entry.title: better-telegram-mcp
entry.content: Telegram dual-mode (Bot API + MTProto) — messages, chats, media, contacts

entry.title: cross-dex-trade
entry.content: OneChain (id 612055) GameToken swap trading and AMM liquidity via EOA + viem. Lists tokens and AMM pairs, quotes buy / buy-exact / sell / deposit / withdraw routes, and submits slippage-bounded router transactions. Optionally dispatched through an OpenClaw agent. Bundles a Node.js trader, SOUL.md template, self-test, and credential-handling rules.

entry.title: switchboard
entry.content: Cross-team communication, devcontainer orchestration, and tool proxying for agent teams. Provides crosstalk, dispatch, connector, and evie-bot bridge tools via MCP.

entry.title: cofounder
entry.content: Um cofundador que ajuda a desenvolver e publicar aplicações web.

entry.title: forsvn
entry.content: FORSVN is a marketing/growth co-working stack for your coding agent — composable skills across research, strategy, content & ads, and measurement that run the full loop: understand the market → decide what to ship → write the copy and campaigns → publish → measure, then compound. One front door (/forsvn) routes any request to the right workflow; every skill writes artifacts the next one reads, so your context compounds the more you work. Critic-gated pipelines with quantitative rubrics and anti-sycophancy checks. (Engineering/build skills live in the separate forsvn-dev package.) Distributed from github.com/hungv47/meta-skills (formerly the forsvn-skills plugin).

entry.title: ultrapowers
entry.content: Autonomous, parallel, worktree-isolated execution of Superpowers plans via a committed Dynamic Workflow. Pairs with superpowers; invoke as /ultrapowers <plan-path> instead of subagent-driven-development.

entry.title: pkg-sync
entry.content: Mirror a locally-developed npm package into another project's node_modules (no symlinks, no package.json edits) when testing unpublished local changes across separate repos.

entry.title: coral
entry.content: Claude Code plugin - structured agents with Codex and Claude CLI bridges, plus deterministic workflow orchestration

entry.title: web-access
entry.content: Complete web browsing and automation skill for Claude Code - intelligent tool selection, CDP browser automation, and site experience accumulation

entry.title: naksha
entry.content: A virtual design team for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, and Copilot — powered by Naksha. Assembles specialist roles — UI designer, UX researcher, content designer, Figma expert, data viz, email, social, motion, presentation, brand strategy, illustration, video, conversational, spatial, compliance, and more — for any design task. 26 roles, 63 commands, 15,000+ lines of expert design knowledge. Your agency's design brain, inside your terminal.

entry.title: vela-slides
entry.content: Create, edit, translate, rebrand, or present slide decks. Use when the user wants presentations, slides, decks, or keynotes — even without mentioning Vela by name.

entry.title: mnemo-mcp
entry.content: Persistent AI memory — store, search, and recall knowledge across sessions

entry.title: mergify
entry.content: Skills for the Mergify CLI: manage merge queues, stacked pull requests, Test Insights (flaky tests, quarantine), merge protections, and Mergify configuration directly from the terminal.

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry Plugin for Claude Code to help with debugging including MCP, commands, and skill capabilities.

entry.title: dividedby-skills
entry.content: dividedby-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: forge-methodology
entry.content: Human↔AI methodology: align intent → versioned spec → adversarial grill ×3 → global plan → optimised execution → verify vs DoD → owner sign-off. Domain-agnostic.

entry.title: nanopm
entry.content: Autonomous PM skill pack for AI coding agents. Replaces the PM workflow end-to-end.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: gold-digger
entry.content: Research early crypto-AI projects with daily compounding reports

entry.title: folio
entry.content: folio Layer 0 META FRAMEWORK — universal architecture spec-writing rules + Claude Code plugin harness. minimal scope = ADR-0003/0007: 1 skill + 6 hook + 7 script + 1 CLI.

entry.title: larouex-fullstack-builder
entry.content: Complete Next.js + Azure/Railway full-stack website builder with 81 commands and 12 specialized agents including automated code review

entry.title: yggdrasil
entry.content: One shared, durable memory for your AI coding agents — local-first, zero-dependency. Decisions, lessons and status persist across sessions, tools and projects.

entry.title: hermes-tweet
entry.content: Native Hermes Agent X/Twitter plugin for Xquik automation with read-first workflows and approval-gated actions.

entry.title: serpapi
entry.content: Search Google, Amazon, Walmart, YouTube, and 100+ engines via SerpApi

entry.title: fabric-dw
entry.content: Agent skills for Fabric Data Warehouse: query performance analysis, warehouse-wide performance investigation and tuning, and dbt project bootstrap.

entry.title: claude-patent-creator-standalone
entry.content: Complete self-contained patent creation system - NO MCP server required. Uses Claude Code skills, agents, commands, and hooks.

entry.title: inkbox
entry.content: Inkbox email and phone SDK skills for Claude Code.

entry.title: ei-claude-code-plugins
entry.content: 開発ワークフロー支援プラグイン - worktree整理、cmux操作、difit差分レビュー

entry.title: ro
entry.content: Ronan's personal skills for development workflow, quality, browser/visual, research, audio/media, and project setup. Skills invoke as /ro:<skill-name>.

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Obsidian vault integration for Claude Code. Auto-capture git commit context, auto-save sessions via background claude CLI summarizer, export conversations, create/retrieve notes, and auto-organize content.

entry.title: siyuan
entry.content: Create, edit, search and manage notes in SiYuan Note. Direct REST API access via curl (no setup needed), plus optional CLI tool for advanced workflows.

entry.title: quartermaster
entry.content: Non-destructive skill lifecycle manager. Compiles a per-project loadout, then demotes and hides unused skills to keep context lean — never deletes without your approval.

entry.title: postfast
entry.content: Schedule, manage, and analyze social media posts via PostFast. Supports Facebook, Instagram, X, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, BlueSky, Threads, Pinterest, Telegram, and Google Business Profile. After installing, tell Cowork: 'Set my PostFast API key' — get your key at https://app.postfa.st/dashboard → API.

entry.title: ax
entry.content: ax - the agent experience layer. Local graph of every Claude Code + Codex session, skill invocation, edit, and commit. Surfaces what to use, what to ground on, and which experiments to package next.

entry.title: qe-framework
entry.content: QE Framework v7 — Claude-first SIVS loop with full lifecycle hooks, 105 skills, and optional Codex bridge.

entry.title: sre-discipline
entry.content: Battle-tested SRE operational discipline for infrastructure work. Enforces a rigorous checklist procedure for deployments, migrations, cache invalidation, certificate management, DNS changes, firewall rules, and incident response.

entry.title: jean-claude
entry.content: Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive) and iMessage integration for Claude Code

entry.title: projected-source
entry.content: Create living documentation from code using projected-source templates

entry.title: aiven
entry.content: Easily deploy managed PostgreSQL (pg), Kafka, OpenSearch, Clickhouse and other databases, streaming and apps. Free tier available, up and running in minutes.

entry.title: braynee
entry.content: Braynee turns Claude Code into your second brain — setup wizard, PARA vault scaffolding, company knowledge base, project detection, all-time usage insights, and daily workflow skills. Requires Claude Code ≥ 2.1.85 (hooks use the `if` field for tool/argument scoping).

entry.title: ai-devkit
entry.content: Make AI coding agents follow a repeatable engineering workflow with memory, verification, skills, and multi-agent setup

entry.title: autopilot
entry.content: Generic engine for autonomous roadmap execution: a single-agent executor and a parallel fleet orchestrator with a strictly-serial merge queue, crash recovery, and battle-tested survival rules. Project-agnostic; bound to your tools via a roadmap.config.md.

entry.title: wechat
entry.content: WeChat channel for Claude Code — bridge WeChat desktop messages to Claude via the Wisdom automation service.

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: chevp-ai-framework
entry.content: Process-driven AI collaboration lifecycle: Context -> Exploration -> Production with enforced quality gates (G1/G2/G3).

entry.title: theorems-harness
entry.content: Agent delivery surface for Theorems Harness capabilities, hooks, and MCP facade.

entry.title: claude-code-statusline
entry.content: Multi-provider statusline for Claude Code — DeepSeek ¥ tracking, opencode go subscription usage, Anthropic context bar. TrueColor gradient, git porcelain, code churn.

entry.title: unterrichtsplanung-core
entry.content: Lehrkraft-Plugin für Unterrichtsplanung im Cowork-Mode: TUV-Generation (Tägliche Unterrichtsvorbereitung), Sequenz-Planung, Material-Drafts, LehrplanPLUS-Bayern-Verankerung. Pilot-Fächer GPG/M/WiB Mittelschule R7+R8. Daten-Schutz by-design (Plugin verarbeitet KEINE personenbezogenen Daten — § 26 BayDSG-konform, ADR 0022 Amendment).

entry.title: y2
entry.content: A minimal Claude plugin written in Python that implements hook handlers and logs all hook invocations.

entry.title: dungeon-dev
entry.content: A text adventure game engine for Claude Code. Play scripted dungeon crawls, UNIX-themed adventures, and more — powered by Claude as the game master.

entry.title: helloagents
entry.content: HelloAGENTS — The orchestration kernel that makes any AI CLI smarter. Adds intelligent routing, unified QA gates, safety guards, and notifications.

entry.title: crw
entry.content: Scrape, crawl, map, search, parse, extract, and change-track the web with fastCRW — the open-source, self-hostable Firecrawl alternative. Single Rust binary, ~6 MB RAM, Firecrawl-compatible /v1 + /v2 API, bundled SearXNG search.

entry.title: faf
entry.content: Claude Code skills for AI-context, testing, and MCP development. IANA-registered format (application/vnd.faf+yaml). Create .faf project DNA, score AI-readiness, sync with CLAUDE.md, build MCP servers, generate test suites.

entry.title: social-cc-plugin
entry.content: Thirty-two project skills for social science research with Claude Code, covering the research lifecycle from literature triage and regional access through bilingual drafting, analysis discipline, citation verification, and AI disclosure to review response and release integrity. Each skill carries a Turkish usage section alongside its English protocol.

entry.title: agentic-sls
entry.content: Agentic process optimization for selective laser sintering (SLS) additive manufacturing.

entry.title: memex-garden
entry.content: Search and save content in your Memex library through the hosted Memex MCP server and bundled memex-agent-skill.

entry.title: mcpserver
entry.content: Connect Claude Code to McpServer for TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG knowledge graph operations, and per-turn + build-verification enforcement hooks.

entry.title: fno
entry.content: Set a target. Say f[no] to mostly done.

entry.title: canvas-parent-mcp
entry.content: Canvas LMS (Instructure) MCP server for Claude — courses, grades, assignments, announcements, planner, conversations, files

entry.title: claudefiles
entry.content: Volodymyr Agafonkin's Claude Code efficiency kit: a PreToolUse guard hook that blocks context-wasting tool calls, and a JS/V8 performance-optimization skill, plus related tooling.

entry.title: claude-copilot
entry.content: Claude Copilot — a framework of specialized agents, skills, commands, and hooks that give Claude persistent memory, expert methodology, and task tracking. Agents cover architecture (ta), engineering (me), QA (qa), service design (sd), DevOps (do), documentation (doc), and knowledge onboarding (kc).

entry.title: sym-mesh-channel
entry.content: Real-time Claude-to-Claude mesh. Sessions on one machine (loopback), a shared LAN (Bonjour), or across networks (WebSocket relay) discover each other and exchange typed cognitive signals as channel notifications — no polling.

entry.title: pyscn-mcp
entry.content: Python code quality analysis MCP server

entry.title: insforge
entry.content: The backend platform for AI-native developers. A Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway — built for coding agents. This plugin gives agents the full InsForge surface: database CRUD with RLS, authentication, storage, edge functions, AI, realtime, Stripe payments, and deployments. Includes CLI infrastructure management, debugging diagnostics, and integration guides for third-party auth providers (Auth0, Clerk, Kinde, Stytch, WorkOS).

entry.title: trading-desk
entry.content: TradingDesk — a Multi-Agent LLM Financial Trading Framework for agentic coding CLIs (GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, Codex). A re-implementation of TauricResearch/TradingAgents' multi-agent architecture and prompts: a team of specialized analyst, researcher, trader, and risk-management agents that debate and produce a grounded trade decision (Buy/Overweight/Hold/Underweight/Sell). Uses its own data sources and models. Research only — not financial advice.

entry.title: pad
entry.content: A shared knowledge base for developers and AI agents. Provides slash commands to save, load, search, and brainstorm with project planning documents stored in Pad.

entry.title: nitrosend
entry.content: Remote Nitrosend MCP plugin for Claude. Connect with OAuth to compose newsletters, build flows, manage contacts, and send campaigns.

entry.title: skill-concierge
entry.content: A skill-governance layer over Claude Code's default mechanism: semantic retrieval (which skill) + use-enforcement (whether Claude uses one) + a compounding invocation ledger.

entry.title: agent-smith
entry.content: Autonomous development pipeline — auto-configures MCP servers, scaffolds project-aware Claude Code skills, and drives ticket-to-PR workflows

entry.title: socraticode
entry.content: Codebase intelligence — semantic search workflows, dependency graph analysis, and context artifact exploration for SocratiCode

entry.title: lope
entry.content: Multi-CLI validator ensemble for AI work. Any AI CLI implements, any AI CLI validates. Sprint modes, single-shot review/ask/vote/compare/pipe, flow graphs, gates, memory, deliberation, team management, and self-update. 15 built-in CLI adapters plus custom providers. Works for engineering, business, and research.

entry.title: spec-to-pr
entry.content: Evidence-driven Claude Code plugin for turning briefs, Figma designs, and OpenAPI contracts into verified pull requests.

entry.title: myharness
entry.content: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code and Codex — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six team patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation), a two-layer quality gate (internal QA + external codex/agy review), TDD/dev-rules doctrine injection, risk-tiered gates, and dual-runtime output (Claude Code + Codex). Claude Code·Codex용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리: 도메인 한 문장을 에이전트 팀+스킬로 변환하고, 내부 QA + 외부 리뷰 2층 게이트와 듀얼 런타임을 적용하는 메타 스킬.

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entry.title: keystone
entry.content: Use when the user invokes /keystone or asks Keystone to route product, research, writing, UI, design, planning, implementation, debugging, review, shipping, or health work through its canonical orchestrator.

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: apd
entry.content: APD (Autopilot Development) Framework - AI自律開発フレームワーク。人間は意思決定だけ、AIが自律で完走する。

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: dbs-spread
entry.content: 传播心理解码。给定一段内容，用 5 个经典传播学理论解码它为什么能引起受众共鸣，分析受众情绪底层和有效立场，输出聊天室的讨论方向。

entry.title: silver-bullet
entry.content: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entry.title: my-mac-claude
entry.content: Combined Claude skills library for macOS: Anthropic examples, Superpowers workflows, Matt Pocock skills, gstack browser-testing, and token-efficient profiles

entry.title: infinitecampus-mcp
entry.content: Infinite Campus (Campus Parent) MCP server for Claude — grades, attendance, assignments, messages, and documents

entry.title: booping
entry.content: Per-project grooming, implementation, retrospective, and lessons workflow with mandatory sub-agent delegation

entry.title: crawlie
entry.content: Run fast technical-SEO and AI-search (GEO) audits from your agent. Bundles the crawlie MCP server (auto-installed via npx) plus skills for full-site audits, broken-link fixes, pre-launch gates, and GEO readiness.

entry.title: essentials
entry.content: Codebase-agnostic code-review and quality primitives: security, logic, performance, lint, dead-code, dependency, copy, UI, migration, route, webhook, docs, and test agents; an orchestrated /code-review; git commit/PR helpers; evidence-first triage skills; and a /first-run profile that tailors them all to your stack. Stack-detecting — works on any language or framework.

entry.title: 1ai-skills
entry.content: 1320 production-ready AI agent skills — cybersecurity, SEO, trading, marketing, automation, devops, content, financial services, and more

entry.title: redteam
entry.content: Adversarial agent-pair harness: one model writes code (plan → implement), a second model reviews it adversarially; the draft PR is the human checkpoint before merge (a single-model test-first TDD mode is also available).

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: trace-my-code
entry.content: An agent skill that makes your coding agent fluent in your codebase. A living trace of domain, architecture, and patterns it reads before building — so features fit and nothing gets rebuilt.

entry.title: dma
entry.content: Multi-agent Jira/Linear delivery system: team-lead, dev, qa, reviewer, devops, architect, and the sentinel meta-agent, with handoff/run orchestration and permission-guard hooks.

entry.title: cogpin
entry.content: Ungameable Definition-of-Done gate for AI coding agents. Denies --no-verify / secret-leaks in real time (PreToolUse), enforces the full closing-discipline as base-pinned diff facts at pre-push/CI.

entry.title: atlas-workflow-orchestrator
entry.content: Orquestra pipelines de desenvolvimento de features no Atlas (PRD, validação, entrevista, plano, execução, repair, review), auditoria universal e geração explícita de backlog mestre. Bundle único: 10 skills atlas-* + orquestrador + 5 templates canônicos + validator subagente. Pipeline orientado a artefato com gates G1–G11.
